identityDescription: Set the user ID that will be embedded in the OpenPGP key.
commentPlaceholder: Work, release signing, or project name
passphraseDescription: The passphrase protects the private key. It is never stored by this tool.
securityDescription: Choose the key type, RSA size when needed, and expiration policy.
eccDescription: Curve25519 is the default choice for modern OpenPGP use and generates quickly.
rsaDescription: RSA is useful for older systems that cannot use Curve25519 keys.
expirationDaysDescription: Use 0 for no expiration. Shorter lifetimes are easier to rotate.
privacyNoteDescription: Generation runs in this browser. Do not paste private keys into chat, tickets, or shared documents.
identityRequiredHint: Add a name or email to generate a key pair.
expirationInvalidError: Expiration must be a whole number from 0 to 36500 days.
resultDescription: Review the fingerprint, then copy or download each armored block.
emptyDescription: Fill in an identity, choose key options, and generate a key pair when ready.
publicKeyDescription: Share this key so others can encrypt messages to you or verify signatures.
privateKeyDescription: Store this key securely. Anyone with this private key can decrypt or sign as this identity.
revocationCertificateDescription: Save this separately so you can revoke the key if it is lost or compromised.
